nodes.label: IA Chat Screen — Active session context + scheduling quick actions
nodes.description: IA (AI coach) chat screen titled 'Tu sesión activa'. AI coach message shows session awareness: '15 min restantes de tu sesión / 3 apps fuera de tu mente / 1 item pendiente en tu ritual / 2 recordatorios activos'. Coach asks how it can help and offers quick action chips: 'Organizar mi horario', 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'. Input field at bottom pre-filled with 'Organiza el horario de mi ritual y aprendizaje del día' with send button (neon green arrow). Mentex Tweaks dev panel visible. Navigation back arrow at top left, plus and calendar icons at top right.
ui_elements: Screen title: 'Tu sesión activa' with dropdown arrow
Session status summary message (15 min restantes, 3 apps blocked, 1 ritual item pending, 2 recordatorios activos)
Quick action chips: 'Organizar mi horario', 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'
Text input pre-filled: 'Organiza el horario de mi ritual y aprendizaje del día'
Top nav: back arrow, title, plus (+) and calendar icons
nodes.app_state: IA tab active, session in progress (15 min remaining), AI coach showing contextual session summary, scheduling intent typed

edges.description: IA quick action 'Organizar mi horario' references and modifies the timeline schedule shown in timeline-colors-nowline screen.
